title: PreFlight – A local AST background daemon to catch AI code drift
abstract: Hey, developers! Ever found yourself dealing with sneaky AI code changes? Fear not – Show HN: PreFlight is here to save the day! Think of it as your personal bodyguard, quietly watching over your code and alerting you to any unexpected changes. Installing it feels like adding a trusty sidekick to your team – no more worrying about potential issues. Give it a try and let PreFlight be your project's safeguard!
abstract_zh: 嘿，程序员小伙伴们！遇到过AI代码悄悄变质的情况没？别怕，Show HN: PreFlight来了！它就像你的私人保镖，默默守护在代码背后，随时发现那些偷偷变化的代码。安装它就像给自己加了个小助手，再也不用担心代码出问题了。快来试试吧，让PreFlight为你的项目保驾护航！
